subject: Re: yachts mag.
body:
yachting


----- Original Message ----
From: nadia marcinkova <nadja2102@yahoo.com>
To: Jeffrey E Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Tuesday, March 27, 2007 5:12:20 PM
Subject: yachts mag.


Mark can do 9.00 am on the 4th, is that ok? 
 
There is no 'Yachts' magazine. 
 
I found 'Yachting' http://www.yachtingmagazine.com/yachting/
 
'Yacht Magazine' http://www.devalk.nl/EN/De_Valk/Yachtmagazine.asp
 
Or 'Yachts and Yachting' http://www.yachtsandyachting.com/shopv51/prodtype.asp?cookiecheck=yes&PT_ID=286&strPageHistory=cat
 
Did you mean either one of those ?
